title: Q2.6 replay-tangent gains are stable across declared seeds
body: Q2.6 seed 2 passed after 700 full-scale commits under the unchanged replay and quantity authorities. If the global replay-tangent intervention, rather than seed-specific luck, reopened the constrained path, independently initialized seeds 1 and 3 should also reach a jointly feasible public checkpoint and pass their disjoint promotion evaluations without changing the accepted design.
claims: Replication varies only the declared training seed while preserving the exact Q2.6 design and authorities.
Both remaining seeds must execute regardless of the first outcome to prevent optional stopping.
